Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 54 

RPTD_MFTR_DSCNT_AMT 

LABEL: Reported Manufacturer Discount Amount at Point of Sale 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the amount that the plan sponsor advanced at the point of sale for the manufacturer 
discount for applicable drugs. 

SHORT NAME: RPTD_MFTR_DSCNT_AMT 

LONG NAME: RPTD_MFTR_DSCNT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: —
